nodes.context: Organised crime group controlled by Dawood Ibrahim, originating in Mumbai, involved in terrorism and smuggling.
Major crime syndicate based in Mumbai, led by Chotta Rajan, involved in extortion, murder, smuggling, drug trafficking.
Gang based at Dagdi Chawl in Byculla, Mumbai, involved in kidnapping, extortion, murder.
Bombay-based smuggling gang led by Haji Mastan, involved in gold, silver, and electronic goods smuggling, and Bollywood financing.
Bombay-based Tamil mobster gang involved in dock cargo theft, contract killings, and narcotics trade.
Crime syndicate of ethnic Pashtuns operating in Bombay docks, involved in hashish trafficking, extortion, gold smuggling, contract killings.
Criminal groups in India that rob houses while wearing only underwear, covering themselves in oil or mud.
Organized criminal gangs in Punjab, India, who wear police uniform or black underpants to evade detection during robberies.
General term for organized crime groups in India, involved in various criminal activities across multiple countries.
Criminal groups from Afghanistan involved in drug trafficking and smuggling.
Organized crime groups in Canada, including Italian Mafia families and other syndicates.
Criminal organizations based in Pakistan, involved in drug trafficking and smuggling.

edges.context: Chotta Rajan was a former key aide and lieutenant of Dawood Ibrahim, operating under D-Company before fleeing India.
Haji Mastan worked in association with Karim Lala in smuggling operations.
Varadarajan Mudaliar operated in tandem with Haji Mastan in stealing dock cargo.
The Indian mafia has alliances with the Afghan mafia.
The Indian mafia has alliances with the Canadian mafia.
The Indian mafia has rivalries with the Pakistani mafia.
